about: I am a passionate undergraduate student in Computer Science and Engineering with a strongfoundation in programming, data structures and software development. I experienced in academicprojects and practical problem-solving with a keen interest in learning new technologies. Able towork effectively in team-based projects and present solutions clearly. Possesses strongcommunication skills, teamwork ability and a positive learning attitude with the capability to explaintechnical concepts clearly. Motivated detail-oriented and eager to apply theoretical knowledge toreal-world applications.ASHRU SARKER
education: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering (2023-2027) Mawlana Bhashani Science and Technology University, Santosh-1902 CGPA: 3.40 / 4.00 (through 4 semesters) Higher Secondary Certificate (2022) Dhaka College, Dhaka Phone: +8801319730039 GitHub: https://github.com/Ashru07 LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ashru-sarker/ Codeforces: https://codeforces.com/profile/Ashru1 LeetCode: https://leetcode.com/u/Ashru1/ AtCoder: https://atcoder.jp/users/Ashru1 CodeChef: https://codechef.com/users/ashru1 GPA: 5.00 / 5.00 Secondary School Certificate (2020) Karfa Public Academy, Barishal GPA: 5.00 / 5.00 PROJECTS Bank Management System Build a GUI-based banking system using C and Windows API Implement user login, registration and admin controls Support deposit, withdrawal and transfer operations Store data using text files with yearly profit calculation
